title: The Blood Axe Uprising
description: The Great Warlord Nahk is uniting the frenzied orc tribes and goblinoid clans across through realm with brute strength and cunning. He seeks the Dragon Pearl - believing himeslf to be the Great Chosen One (a prophecy uttered by their shamans) destined to rule all of Arland.

nodes.text_template: A frightened farmer slams his mug down. He swears he saw a small war-band of orc scouts setting up a camp in the {biome} just outside of town.
The local blacksmith sighs heavily. Supply lines are completely cut off because orcs have seized the deep iron mines in the nearby {biome}.
A high-ranking scout drags himself into the tavern, bleeding. He gasps that Chieftain Malkor has built a massive, heavily fortified stone stronghold {direction} of here.
